title: lithocardium parviflorum
parts: Lithocardium parviflorum has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and flowers, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The roots of Lithocardium parviflorum contain saponins and flavonoids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The leaves and flowers contain phenolic acids and terpenoids, which have been reported to have antimicrobial and antiviral activities.
